Next Event

A Pre-Constructed Twin Suns Tournament

Galactic
Escalation

Win a set of premium metal Twin Suns Initiative Tokens

Date Sun. May 24
Time 6:00 PM
Location Abbotsford
Entry $10

Bring an unaltered pre-constructed Twin Suns deck from the Twin Suns 2026 release block and battle it out across 3 rounds to take your deck to the top of the table.

Top prize: a set of premium metal Twin Suns initiative tokens from Metalfab. All players receive Lawless Time Booster Packs based on final standings.

Which deck will be most represented? Which will prove most formidable? Come and find out.

Location TBD depending on number of participants.

// About

What is No Disintegrations?

A fan-run tournament series built around the Twin Suns multiplayer format of Star Wars: Unlimited. Based in Western Canada. Laser-focused on making competitive four-player events worth showing up for.

⭐

Innovative & Creative Tournaments

Beyond Swiss Rounds of Premier Constructed. We test, iterate, and experiment with new structures, varied point systems, and strange conditions — so you get a tournament experience unlike anything else.

⚔️

Casually Competitive

We take it seriously and we encourage you to play to win. But most of the time the situations are too insane not to laugh at. We reward great plays and great players.

🥇

Great Prizing at the Top. Great Prizing for the Rest.

We hate spending a day at a tournament just to walk away with a single promo card and the stain of tears. We believe in real prizes for top standings and worthwhile prizes for everyone else — so even the bottom of the table walks away with something meaningful.

🎯

Twin-Suns First

The four-player format of Star Wars: Unlimited is an incredible arena for growth, competition, and innovation. It's genuinely fun and genuinely competitive. It's what we are laser-focused on.

📍

Canadian.

There is an awesome crowd of talented competitors in Canada and we are committed to building a community and tournament series that puts them first. Certainly, all are welcome. But our first thoughts are with the True North.

No Disintegrations  ·  Twin Suns Tournament Series  ·  Abbotsford, BC
Star Wars: Unlimited is property of Fantasy Flight Games / Lucasfilm Ltd.
No Disintegrations is an independent fan-run series.
